features: 【Christmas Snowflakes Pouches】Crafted from sheer white organza with sparkling silver snowflake prints, these Christmas gift bags add a touch of winter wonder to your Christmas celebrations.

【9x12CM Christmas Organza Bags】Each white organza bag measures 9x12 cm and comes in a value pack of 50, ideal for wrapping small gifts, candies, jewellery, or party favours during the Christmas season.
【50PCS Organza Drawstring Bags】Featuring a sturdy satin drawstring, these organza pouches keep items safe while making wrapping quick and easy, perfect for busy Christmas gift preparations.

【Organza Bags for Gift Wrapping】Create Memorable Gifts – Make your presents stand out with charming Xmas organza pouches that delight family, friends, and guests, creating magical Christmas memories filled with Christmas cheer.
【Versatile Christmas Use】Great for Christmas parties, stocking fillers, wedding favours, festive decorations, or business packaging, these silver snowflake bags bring elegance to any occasion.
